title: schollera limosa
intro: Schollera limosa is a flowering plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight against bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Schollera limosa include its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis, asthma, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Schollera limosa can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
